reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. An attacker can trigger this via P2P network by requesting a large range that forces quota exhaustion mid-block, causing partial sidecar delivery that violates the all-or-nothing atomicity requirement. The impact affects individual peer sync operations (reconstruction failures, wasted bandwidth) but does not meet the Medium severity threshold of '>5% network impact'. Downgraded from Medium to Low based on BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE severity thresholds.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: SG-008: All sidecars of a block must be included in by_range response if any sidecar is included
